blocks.text: Camp Nou Miracle or Curtain Call? Barcelona Need Four Goals

Tuesday's headline act is Barcelona hosting Atlético Madrid in the Copa del Rey — trailing 4-0 on aggregate, a legendary comeback is needed. Meanwhile, Liverpool travel to Molineux with Arsenal watching closely from the top of the table.
⚽ Copa del Rey: Barcelona vs Atlético Madrid — semifinal second leg, 4-0 down. Miracle or exit? 21:00
Liverpool sit 16 points behind leaders Arsenal — but a win keeps European dreams alive. Arsenal just beat West Ham in the London derby; all eyes now on how results shape the top five.
